_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 5 ban_context values in banned_recalled_ingredients.json. Disambiguates WHY a substance was flagged — substance-level vs adulterant vs contamination vs export-control vs watchlist.
_metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for ban-context labels. Drives the alert-context badge in Flutter (e.g. 'adulterant in supplements' vs 'contamination recall').
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/data/banned_recalled_ingredients.json `ban_context` field (146 entries; live: substance=95, adulterant_in_supplements=29, watchlist=12, contamination_recall=9, export_restricted=1).

field_contract.name: User-facing label.
field_contract.when_it_applies: Plain-text description of the situation that triggers this context.

ban_contexts.name: Substance-level ban
ban_contexts.notes: The substance itself is banned, regardless of product or formulation. Most common ban context.
ban_contexts.when_it_applies: FDA, DEA, or international authority has prohibited the substance in any form sold to consumers.
ban_contexts.action_recommendation: Avoid all products containing this substance.

ban_contexts.name: Adulterant in supplements
ban_contexts.notes: Substance is legal in other contexts (food, cosmetics) but considered an adulterant when added to dietary supplements.
ban_contexts.when_it_applies: FDA has issued an adulterant determination specific to the dietary supplement category (DSHEA).
ban_contexts.action_recommendation: Avoid supplements that list this substance; legal in non-supplement products.

ban_contexts.name: Contamination recall
ban_contexts.notes: Specific products were recalled because of contamination (heavy metals, microbial, undeclared pharmaceutical), not because the substance itself is banned.
ban_contexts.when_it_applies: Recall driven by lot-specific QC failure rather than the ingredient identity.
ban_contexts.action_recommendation: Check the recall lot number; the substance itself may still be safe in clean products.

ban_contexts.name: Regulatory watchlist
ban_contexts.notes: Substance is under active monitoring by regulators. Not yet banned but warrants caution and informed-consent discussion.
ban_contexts.when_it_applies: FDA, NIH, or EFSA has flagged the substance for ongoing safety review.
ban_contexts.action_recommendation: Use with provider awareness; monitor regulatory updates.

ban_contexts.name: Export-restricted
ban_contexts.notes: Substance is legal in the country of origin but cannot be exported to certain markets due to local regulations.
ban_contexts.when_it_applies: International trade restriction (e.g. EU vs US permitted-substance differences).
ban_contexts.action_recommendation: Verify legality in your country before purchasing.
